title: Ritual Discipline Foundations
subtitle: Build a clean foundation for symbolic and ritual practice.
short_description: A structured entry course for disciplined magical study.
long_description: A practical starter course that combines symbolic orientation ritual structure and steady personal practice into one guided path.
learning_outcomes: Daily ritual consistency|Symbolic literacy|A clearer personal study rhythm
who_its_for: New students seeking structure|Practitioners rebuilding consistency
includes: Guided modules|Video and text lessons|Downloadable ritual worksheet
seo_description: Structured ritual training for serious Perseus students.
lesson_content: Begin by grounding the study path and the role of repeatable practice.
